name: API Key Authentication
description: Add API key authentication for machine-to-machine communication. Keys are hashed (never stored in plain text), support scopes (read/write/admin), and tie into rate limiting.

steps.description: Check existing auth setup and middleware
Install crypto library for key hashing
Create generateApiKey(), hashKey(), and verifyKey() utilities
Create ApiKey model with id, keyHash, name, scopes, lastUsed, expiresAt
Create middleware that extracts Bearer token, hashes it, and looks up the key
Test key generation, authentication, and revocation
Verify API key auth tests pass

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Secure machine-to-machine auth with hashed keys, scopes, and rate limiting
